## 🎯 Goal

Upgrade embedded Kotlin version to **NEXT_VERSION**.

## 📝 Specifications

- Badges in README documentations MUST be updated.
- Dependency compatibility documentation MUST be updated.
- Changelog (see `CHANGELOG.md` file) MUST be updated.
